== Notes for [[Item:Q98308|Q98308]] ==

Shalom ,

son of Hizkiah and nn to: nn

1) Nathan (De Zuzita?) to: nn

--------------------
source: http://www.geni.com/people/Shalom-ben-Hizkiya/6000000000802583215?through=6000000000802594245

Shalom ,

son of Hizkiah and nn to: nn

1) Nathan (De Zuzita?) to: nn

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
6702EFBB6E4561EFBBF89829A6488A4D4F3D
geni:6000000000802583215

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
